title: Luglon

infobox.value: (French pronunciation: [[lyɡlɔ̃]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"); [Occitan](/wiki/Occitan_language "Occitan language"): *Luclong*) is a [commune](/wiki/Communes_of_France "Communes of France") in the [Landes](/wiki/Landes_(department) "Landes (department)") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France") in [Nouvelle-Aquitaine](/wiki/Nouvelle-Aquitaine "Nouvelle-Aquitaine") in south-western [France](/wiki/France "France").

["Répertoire national des élus: les maires"](https://www.data.gouv.fr/fr/datasets/r/2876a346-d50c-4911-934e-19ee07b0e503). *data.gouv.fr, Plateforme ouverte des données publiques françaises* (in French). 2 December 2020.
["Populations de référence 2023"](https://www.insee.fr/fr/statistiques/8643952?geo=COM-40165) (in French). National Institute of Statistics and Economic Studies. 18 December 2025.

**Luglon** (French pronunciation: [[lyɡlɔ̃]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"); [Occitan](/wiki/Occitan_language "Occitan language"): *Luclong*) is a [commune](/wiki/Communes_of_France "Communes of France") in the [Landes](/wiki/Landes_(department) "Landes (department)") [department](/wiki/Departments_of_France "Departments of France") in [Nouvelle-Aquitaine](/wiki/Nouvelle-Aquitaine "Nouvelle-Aquitaine") in south-western [France](/wiki/France "France").
